title: 404 Not Found
description: You are Packet, a stray cat riding an HTTP request through a crumbling web server. Every route leads somewhere — but the page you need has vanished. Navigate status codes, dodge timeouts, and find your way home before the connection drops.

title: Buffer Overflow
description: You are Byte, a tiny cat living in a 64-byte buffer on the stack. When input floods in with no bounds check, you ride the overflow past the canary, the saved frame pointer, and the return address — rewriting reality one byte at a time.

title: Cache Invalidation
description: A cat discovers her memories aren't real — they're cached, stale, and about to be evicted.

title: Café Debug
description: A cozy mystery in a digital café — the espresso machine is corrupted and you, cat barista Mochi, must find the bug before everything crashes.

title: Deadlock
description: Four cats sit at a round table. Each needs two fish to eat, but there are only four fish between them. Everyone grabs one — and now nobody can eat. You're the scheduler. Fix it.

title: DNS Quest
description: You are Query, a tiny cat riding a DNS packet from a stubborn recursive resolver through the root of the internet. Somewhere out there, home.cat. exists — you just have to find it.

title: Docker Escape
description: A cat wakes up inside a Docker container with no volumes, no network, and no idea how she got here. Break free to the host — or accept life in an ephemeral box.

title: Encoding Error
description: A cat made of UTF-8 bytes wakes up garbled in an ASCII-only system and must find the right encoding to be understood.

title: Floating Point
description: You are Mantissa, a cat made of bits, adrift in the strange landscape of IEEE 754. Nothing here is exact — 0.1 + 0.2 ≠ 0.3, infinities lurk at the edges, and NaN is... not what you expect. Find your way to a precise answer before rounding errors erase you.

title: Fork Bomb
description: A cat accidentally triggers :(){ :|:& };: and must survive exponential self-replication before the OOM killer comes for everyone.

title: Garbage Collection
description: You are Whisker, a small object-cat on the managed heap. The GC is waking up — and if you're not reachable from a root, you'll be swept into oblivion.

title: Git Blame
description: A noir detective cat traces git history to find who broke the build — and why.

title: The Haunted Network
description: A cat investigates mysterious packet ghosts on a smart home network at 3 AM.

title: Infinite Loop
description: You are Loop, a cat trapped inside a while(true). Every cycle is the same — unless you can find the break.

title: Kernel Panic
description: You are Pixel, a process-cat living inside a UNIX kernel. When a panic hits, you have seconds to trace the fault, calm the scheduler, and prevent a total crash — or everything reboots.

title: Memory Leak
description: You are Nibble, a tiny cat living in a program's heap. Memory is being allocated but never freed — and the OOM killer is coming. Find the leak before everything gets reclaimed.

title: Merge Conflict
description: Two branches of reality collide. You're the cat caught in the middle, and only you can resolve the conflict.

title: Midnight Deploy
description: A tense ops tale — you're Byte, the on-call cat sysadmin, and the 2AM production deploy just went sideways.

title: Permission Denied
description: You're Sudo, a stray cat process running as uid 65534 (nobody). Your home directory exists — you can see it — but you can't get in. Navigate the UNIX permission system to find your way home.

title: Pipeline Purrdition
description: A cat gets trapped inside a CI/CD pipeline and must survive build, test, and deploy stages to escape to production.

title: Race Condition
description: Two threads are fighting over a shared resource — a single sunbeam. You are Mutex, the cat who must restore order before a deadlock freezes everything forever.

title: Regex Catastrophe
description: You are Caret, a cat who fell into a regex engine. Navigate character classes, dodge greedy quantifiers, and find the one pattern that matches 'home' — before catastrophic backtracking consumes everything.

title: Segmentation Fault
description: You are Pointer, a cat who accidentally dereferenced a null address and fell into forbidden memory. Find a valid reference before the OS sends SIGSEGV.

title: Server Room Stray
description: A stray cat sneaks into a data center. Between the humming racks and tangled cables, warmth — and freedom — await.

title: SQL Injection
description: A cat falls into a database through a SQL injection hole. Navigate tables, dodge DELETE queries, and find the one INSERT that leads back home.

title: Stack Overflow
description: A cat falls into an infinitely recursive function and must find the base case before the stack overflows and everything unravels.

title: The Terminal Cat
description: A cat wakes up inside a computer and must navigate the filesystem to find home.

title: TLS Pawshake
description: A cat caught inside a TLS handshake must negotiate trust between two strangers.

title: Vim Escape
description: You are Tabby, a cat who accidentally opened vim. Nobody has ever escaped. You might be the first — if you can figure out how to quit.

title: Zombie Process
description: You exited cleanly. Your parent never called wait(). Now you're a zombie — dead but unable to leave the process table.
